args.query: SELECT "Index", AVG((High - Low) / Open) as avg_volatility FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('HSI', '000001.SS', 'N225', '399001.SZ', 'NSEI', 'TWII') AND Date >= '2020-01-01' GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY avg_volatility DESC LIMIT 1;

val_args.query: SELECT "Index", AVG((High - Low) / Open) as avg_volatility FROM index_trade WHERE "Index" IN ('HSI', '000001.SS', 'N225', '399001.SZ', 'NSEI', 'TWII') AND Date >= '2020-01-01' GROUP BY "Index" ORDER BY avg_volatility DESC LIMIT 1;
